generatedStatePolicy: fixture-scoped only; generated localization reports, locale proposals, and demo outputs remain untracked unless explicitly fixture-scoped
boundary: Rust/local state/shape checks only; browser/Studio read-only or draft-only; generated runs/artifacts remain untracked unless fixture-scoped; no timing flakes, no trusted writes, no auto-apply, no auto-merge, no self-approval, no creative/tone automation, no fun/quality/production/Godot-replacement claim; #1 and #23 remain open

rows.expectedShape: source catalog contains stable string ids, source refs, context, and declared placeholders matching source text
complete es-ES locale validates pass with proposalOnly true and placeholder sets preserved
missing required string id fails closed with visible diagnostic
missing or renamed placeholders fail closed with per-string diagnostics
demo resolves a localized title and rejects incomplete locale without network or live browser
source locale en-US remains the default catalog text path and does not require generated locale proposal
